summary: Iteration 5 (magic-link auth + portal sign-in): 19/19 backend pytest cases pass and full frontend e2e flow passes for both patient (4 requests) and therapist (3 referrals; '+' email regex-escape verified) signed-in flows. Sign-in dropdown in header (Patient/Therapist/Admin), sessionStorage-based session, role-guarded portals, cross-role 403, missing/invalid-token 401, rate-limit 429 on 6th request, single-use codes, and silent-success on unknown therapist email all confirmed.
action_items: (Optional) Resend test mode only delivers email to the verified Resend account — magic codes still arrive in DB so verify-code works regardless. Consider adding a banner in PatientPortal/TherapistPortal noting Resend test-mode limitation if real email delivery is expected in this env.
(Optional, carryover) Hard-delete TEST_-prefixed therapists/requests created during regression runs to keep admin dashboard counts stable.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py grew to 841 lines — close to the 700-line guideline. Auth/portal block (lines 528-686) is logically separable; consider extracting to /app/backend/auth_portal.py in a future refactor.

auth_request_code uses `created_at` ISO string compared with $gte to one_hour_ago ISO string — works because format is lexicographically comparable, but a real Date field would be safer. Currently correct.

Magic-code rate-limit is per (email, role). A user could request 5 patient + 5 therapist codes for the same email in an hour. Probably fine since therapist role already requires existing record, but worth noting.
auth_verify_code does not check that `role` matches the role on the magic_codes record beyond the find filter — it does (find filter includes role). Correct.
Single-use enforcement is correct: `used:false` filter + atomic update_one to set used=true. Second use returns 401 (verified by test_second_use_of_same_code_fails).
require_session correctly distinguishes 401 (missing/invalid/expired) vs 403 (wrong role). Cross-role tests (patient hitting therapist endpoint and vice versa) both return 403 as designed.
Therapist-referrals endpoint excludes patient `email` field at the projection level AND uses _safe_summary_for_therapist({**r,'email':''}) — double-anonymized. PII guard verified by test.
re.escape on email in _portal_patient_requests / _portal_therapist_referrals correctly handles '+' character in 'therapymatch+t007@gmail.com' — tested end-to-end with 3 referrals returned.
Frontend SignIn.jsx: getSession check in useEffect auto-redirects already-signed-in users to their portal — good UX.
Frontend PatientPortal/TherapistPortal: 401 response correctly clears sessionStorage and redirects to /sign-in?role=... (handler in catch). Confirmed by code inspection.
Frontend Header dropdown uses Radix DropdownMenu with asChild Link — both keyboard-accessible and routes correctly. data-testids on all 3 items (signin-as-patient/therapist/admin).

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all tested flows (header dropdown, both sign-in flows, portal lists, cross-redirects, sign-out, no-session redirects)

test_credentials: Admin: admin123! | Patient: therapymatch@gmail.com (4 requests) | Therapist: therapymatch+t007@gmail.com (3 referrals)
seed_data_creation: Created/cleaned magic_codes for therapymatch@gmail.com and therapymatch+t007@gmail.com during tests. One TEST_iter5_smoke@example.com request created via /api/requests regression smoke. One TEST_iter5_rl@example.com used 5 codes (then deleted) for rate-limit test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL: https://match-engine-test-1.preview.emergentagent.com. Run iter-5 backend tests: `export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://match-engine-test-1.preview.emergentagent.com MONGO_URL=mongodb://localhost:27017 DB_NAME=test_database ADMIN_PASSWORD='admin123!' && pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration5_auth.py -v`. To get the magic code for UI tests, query mongo: `mongosh test_database --eval 'db.magic_codes.find({email:"...",role:"...",used:false}).sort({created_at:-1}).limit(1)'`. Frontend session keys: tv_session_token, tv_session_role, tv_session_email in sessionStorage. JWT_SECRET in /app/backend/.env; SESSION_TTL_DAYS=30, MAGIC_CODE_TTL_MINUTES=30, MAGIC_CODE_MAX_PER_HOUR=5. Therapist 'pending_approval'=false + is_active=true is required for therapist magic-code; unknown emails get silent {ok:true} with no DB row (verified). Note: `motor` is NOT installed in the playwright sandbox — use `mongosh` via subprocess instead (as done in this iteration).
verified_features: POST /api/auth/request-code therapist (unknown email) -> 200 {ok:true} but NO code created (no enumeration leak)
GET /api/portal/me with valid token -> {email, role}; missing token -> 401; invalid token -> 401
GET /api/portal/patient/requests returns >=4 requests for therapymatch@gmail.com; verification_token excluded; application_count + notified_count present
GET /api/portal/therapist/referrals returns 3 referrals for therapymatch+t007@gmail.com (regex-escape '+' verified); each has match_score, applied bool, anonymized summary; no patient email leaked
FRONTEND header: Sign-in dropdown shows 3 items; admin item -> /admin
FRONTEND /sign-in?role=patient: patient tab default; switching to therapist updates blurb to mention 'referrals'
FRONTEND patient e2e: enter email -> code step -> verify (code from DB) -> /portal/patient -> 4 requests -> click first -> /results/:id
FRONTEND sessionStorage: tv_session_token + tv_session_role=patient stored; sign-out clears them and navigates away
FRONTEND therapist e2e: ?role=therapist defaults therapist tab; sign-in -> /portal/therapist -> 3 referrals; first referral href = /therapist/apply/:requestId/:therapistId
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — feature works end-to-end; no defects observed.
